stories.author: The Lever team
stories.title: Corporate Dems Are Weaponizing Graham Platner’s Demise
stories.text: Democratic powerbrokers are now positioned to use the Maine Senate candidate’s withdrawal to overturn voters’ policy demands.

stories.author: Judd Legum
stories.title: The allegations against Platner were disqualifying. He had to drop out. The difference between Platner and T...
stories.text: The allegations against Platner were disqualifying. He had to drop out. The difference between Platner and Trump is Platner was credibly accused by a victim — Trump was credibly accused by a victim AND found liable by a jury.

stories.title: Took my son down to the Twins ballpark on the e-bike for the first time tonight. Peak dadding. The great thing...
stories.text: Took my son down to the Twins ballpark on the e-bike for the first time tonight. Peak dadding. The great thing about Minneapolis is that you can get here almost entirely on off-street trails.

stories.author: Aaron Rupar
stories.title: Trump's 'great' fair limps to its conclusion
stories.text: "Now Trump has figured out how to exploit existing government nonprofits as a clearinghouse for cash, letting corporate donors buy their way into his good graces while the public is left guessing who paid for what — and what they got in return." — @

stories.author: Drop Site team
stories.title: The Crimson Thread: The Israeli Military Barrier Cutting Off Palestine’s Breadbasket
stories.text: The first 22 kilometers of a planned 500-kilometer Israeli military barrier are cutting off Palestinians from a large swathe of some of the most fertile agricultural land in the occupied West Bank.

stories.text: there are men on the left who will see right wing men as their allies above left wing women because in their eyes the former confirms masculinity and the latter conveys weakness
